QuestionRecord.title: Question Record
QuestionRecord.description: A record of a wrong question and its generated analogous questions.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns this record.

originalQuestion.description: The text of the original wrong question.

originalOptions.description: Optional list of options for the original question.

originalAnswer.description: The correct answer to the original question.

knowledgePoint.description: The core knowledge point identified for the question.

subject.description: The subject of the question (e.g., Math, Physics).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

questions.description: Collection of wrong questions and their transformations.
